# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Start from the latest golang base image
FROM golang:latest

# Add Maintainer Info
LABEL maintainer="Microservice Team"

# Set the Current Working Directory inside the container 
WORKDIR /app

# Copy go mod and sum files 
COPY go.mod go.sum ./

# Download all Dependencies 
RUN go mod download 

# Copy the source from the current directory to the Working Directory inside the container 
COPY . . 

# Build the Go app 
RUN go build -o main .

# Expose port 8080 to the outside 
EXPOSE 8080

# Command to run the executable 
CMD ["./main"]
